title: Nami Is Taken Onto the Ark
description: Enel’s larger plan emerges as the Ark Maxim becomes central to his dream of leaving Skypiea behind.
scene: Across pages 19, this scene centers on Enel, Nami, Sanji, Usopp, Gan Fall. Enel’s larger plan emerges as the Ark Maxim becomes central to his dream of leaving Skypiea behind.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You should focus on saving yourselves first!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Anyway, no one will make it through.

summary: Enel’s larger plan emerges as the Ark Maxim becomes central to his dream of leaving Skypiea behind.
